TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lwax_khu‚Äô, title = Lwax_khu‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lwax_khu‚Äô} }

S.FORM: alang Lwax khu' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 80 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 49 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 34%, saySiyat 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lwax khu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga Trayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Lwax khu' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 80 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 49 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 34%, saySiyat 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lwax khu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga Trayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč lwax kńßu Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na lwax kńßu Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na lwax kńßu Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na lwax kńßu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na lwax kńßu Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na lwax kńßu Ē ńßja Ē …£a trajan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
